title: Structure specification for the global SFC from-whom-to-whom (FWTW) matrix
integrity_rule: Every cell carries source_basis in {OBSERVED, ESTIMATED, UNVERIFIED-by-absence, HOLE}. OBSERVED cites the contract+pulled file. ESTIMATED names the method below before use. UNVERIFIED-by-absence cites the contract finding that the publisher has no such series. HOLE cites the access friction. No cell is left untagged.

structure.design_principle: A tractable, honest matrix bounded by what the 12 contracts actually deliver in machine-readable form. The dense, real blocks are: (1) the US issuer-to-holder sector matrix (Fed EFA FWTW), (2) cross-border USD bank positions by counterparty country (BIS LBS), (3) foreign holdings of US Treasuries by country (TIC), (4) the world reserve-currency marginal (COFER), (5) euro-area/EU who-to-whom sector accounts (ECB QSA). China cross-border counterparty cells are thin by construction of the China sources and are tagged accordingly.

sector_set.source: Fed Z.1 EFA FWTW holder/issuer sector list (fed_financial_accounts contract), reduced to a global-tractable set; cross-walked to ESA/SNA where ECB/OECD supply marginals.
sectors: S3_OFI (other financial: MMF, mutual funds, ETFs, brokers, ABS, GSE, insurers, pensions)
sector_set.sector_crosswalk_basis: Fed FWTW 27 holder / 26 issuer codes aggregated to S1-S7 (fed_z1/fwtw_2026Q1.json); BIS counterparty sector L_CP_SECTOR=A (all sectors) used at area level only; ECB ESA sectors S11/S12K/S125/S13/S1M map to S5/S2/S3/S4/S6.

structure.counterparty_sector_set: Identical to sector_set (square holder x issuer within an area for the US block; area x area for cross-border blocks). Who-to-whom counterpart-sector resolution is OBSERVED only for the US (Fed FWTW) and euro-area/EU (ECB QSA) blocks; for all other areas the counterpart sector collapses to S7_ROW or is UNVERIFIED-by-absence.

instrument_set.source: Fed Z.1 instrument list (31 components) reduced to a tractable global set the other sources can populate.
instruments: I1_DEPOSITS_LOANS (currency, deposits, loans, interbank) -- BIS LBS + Fed + ECB
I2_DEBT_SECURITIES (Treasury, agency, corporate/foreign bonds, municipal, open market paper) -- TIC + Fed + CPIS(HOLE)
I3_EQUITY_FUND_SHARES (corporate equity, mutual/MMF/fund shares) -- Fed (US equity excluded from FWTW per publisher) + CPIS(HOLE)
I4_RESERVE_ASSETS (official FX reserves by currency, monetary gold) -- COFER (currency marginal) + WGC gold (HOLE)
I5_DIRECT_INVESTMENT (FDI debt + equity) -- Fed RoW cells only; CDIS not in contract set
I6_OTHER (insurance, pension, trade credit, miscellaneous) -- Fed + ECB marginals

area_set.source: Union of areas the bilateral sources actually resolve. TIC (41 counterparty countries to US), BIS LBS (per-counterparty, 19 pulled), ECB QSA (EU member states), COFER (World aggregate only).
area_set.note_china: CN appears as a counterparty in TIC and BIS LBS (OBSERVED from counterparty-reported claims). CN as a REPORTER yields only marginals (nbs, pboc) plus one bilateral quadrant (safe: China outward portfolio ASSETS by counterparty, semiannual).

structure.matrix_dimensions: 7 sectors x 7 counterparty-sectors x 6 instruments x 22 areas (as the declared cell space). Density is uneven and reported per block; the matrix is NOT dense and is not claimed to be.

estimation_methods_named_before_use.name: counterparty-mirror
estimation_methods_named_before_use.definition: Where an economy does not report its own liabilities bilaterally, use the counterparty's reported CLAIM on it as the estimate of its liability. Applied to: China's USD bank liabilities estimated from BIS LBS all-reporting-banks USD claims ON China (bis_lbs/lbs_compact.json, denom=USD position=C cp=CN); China's US-Treasury liability to US estimated from TIC foreign holdings of US Treasuries attributed to China Mainland (treasury_tic/mfh_dec2025.json).

estimation_methods_named_before_use.name: RAS / Sinkhorn biproportional balancing
estimation_methods_named_before_use.definition: Iterative proportional fitting of a nonnegative seed matrix to fixed row and column marginals. Used to reconcile the assembled bilateral seed to the area-level claim/liability marginals. Residual = max abs(marginal - achieved marginal) after convergence, reported per pass in dp2_residual.json. Negative Fed FWTW cells (publisher-confirmed sign reversals) are excluded from the RAS seed and reported as a coverage gap, because RAS requires nonnegative entries.

estimation_methods_named_before_use.name: GCAP residency->nationality reallocation
estimation_methods_named_before_use.definition: Reallocate dollar claims booked against the RESIDENCE of an offshore issuer (Cayman/BVI/HK custodial booking) to the NATIONALITY of the ultimate issuer (China). Requires a residence-vs-nationality basis differential. Attempted from BIS LBS (which carries L_PARENT_CTY for the REPORTING bank but NOT counterparty nationality) and from the BIS consolidated/nationality banking statistics. Effect reported with numbers in dp2_residual.json; if no real residence-vs-nationality basis is obtainable for the COUNTERPARTY (issuer) side, the magnitude is reported as a HOLE and NOT invented.

cell_basis_register.dimensions: S1-S7 holder x S1-S7 issuer x I1-I6 instrument, residency basis
caveats: Publisher-confirmed ESTIMATED issuer-to-holder allocation (~2/3 fully specified, <1/4 by proportional assumption).
Corporate equities EXCLUDED from FWTW by the publisher: I3 equity cells partially UNVERIFIED-by-absence within this block.
Negative levels occur (sign-reversed relationships); excluded from RAS seed.

cell_basis_register.dimensions: all-reporting-banks (S2) USD claims and liabilities vs counterparty area, instrument I1, residency basis
caveats: Counterparty SECTOR resolved only at L_CP_SECTOR=A (all sectors): no sector x sector resolution at counterparty-area level. Per-counterparty USD x foreign-currency-type split returned 'No results' on the public API; only L_CURR_TYPE=A (denom fixes currency) is populated -> counterparty-sector and currency-type granularity is UNVERIFIED-by-absence at the bilateral level.

cell_basis_register.area: 41 counterparty countries incl. CN, JP, GB, KY, HK, BE, LU
cell_basis_register.dimensions: S7_ROW(by country) holder x S4_GOVERNMENT(US) issuer x I2 debt, residency/custodial basis
caveats: CONFIRMED custodial/financial-center bias (publisher footnote): hub countries (BE/LU/KY/IE/CH/GB) overstated vs beneficial owner -- this is the exact residence-vs-nationality distortion GCAP must address.
Monthly figures are partly estimated, benchmarked to annual SHL survey.
World/group aggregate only; no bilateral creditor-by-debtor detail and no individual-country composition (confidential). It is a MARGINAL, not a FWTW cell source.

cell_basis_register.area: EU member states (FR,DE,etc.) x counterpart sector
cell_basis_register.dimensions: REF_SECTOR x COUNTERPART_SECTOR x instrument, ESA2010 residency basis
cell_basis_register.n_cells: 306238 rows pulled; mixed units (XDC stocks, ratios, per-capita). Stock positions (STO=LE) in XDC are the usable subset.
caveats: Heterogeneous units in the whole-dataflow pull; only STO=LE, ACCOUNTING_ENTRY A/L, in XDC are balance-sheet stocks. Currency conversion XDC->USD per area not applied (UNVERIFIED conversion basis); euro-area block is reported as available who-to-whom marginals, not merged USD cells.
Counterpart-sector detail only for deposits/loans/debt securities/listed shares/fund shares per the contract.

cell_basis_register.dimensions: China outward portfolio investment ASSETS by counterparty economy and holder sector, semiannual
cell_basis_register.friction: SAFE publishes this CPIS-aligned table as HTML press text + Excel on www.safe.gov.cn; the contract verified its EXISTENCE and top-5 recipients (HK 978.9, US 364.0, KY 145.1, BVI 65.2, GB 48.5 USD bn end-2025) but did not confirm a machine API or open the full Excel. Not pulled here (access-frictioned China source, effort-capped). The top-5 end-2025 values are recorded in the contract evidence_excerpt but are NOT loaded as matrix cells because the full counterparty table was not obtained.

cell_basis_register.dimensions: China sector-by-instrument control totals, single RoW column
cell_basis_register.finding: nbs and pboc are MARGINALS-ONLY per their contracts: no creditor-sector x debtor-sector and no counterparty-country dimension (single netted RoW). Bilateral China cells are UNVERIFIED-by-absence (publisher has no such series). The marginal VALUES themselves are a HOLE: NBS yearbook is JPG-image only (OCR/hand-key required, not pulled) and data.stats.gov.cn is WAF-403; PBoC tables net foreign exposure into a single 'Net Foreign Assets' line and were not pulled.

cell_basis_register.dimensions: I2 debt + I3 equity portfolio positions, holder-sector x issuer-sector, residency
cell_basis_register.friction: IMF SDMX PIP v5.0.0 endpoint confirmed live and DSD/INDICATOR codelist resolved (P_TOTINV_P_USD is the correct indicator), but every data query (US.A.P_TOTINV_P_USD.... and all sector-code variants S1/_T, FREQ A, startPeriod 2023/2024, lastNObservations) returned an EMPTY dataset envelope (0 observations, 4714-byte stub). The contract itself flagged the latest reference period and a working data key as UNVERIFIED; that wall was hit. CPIS bilateral cells are therefore not obtainable through the verified access path with the codes resolvable here.

cell_basis_register.dimensions: I4 monetary gold by holder country
cell_basis_register.friction: Goldhub gold-reserves files are login-walled Excel; access-frictioned source, not pulled (effort-capped). COFER supplies the FX-reserve currency marginal but NOT monetary gold; the gold leg of I4 is a HOLE.

cell_basis_register.dimensions: counterpart-sector cells for advanced economies outside US/euro-area
cell_basis_register.finding: Per the OECD contract, the counterpart (who-to-whom) balance-sheet dataflow DF_T725R_A covers mainly euro-area reporters; among the target non-US/non-EA advanced economies only ISR (and RUS) appear. For JP/GB/CA/CH/KR the publisher offers only NON-counterpart marginals (DF_T720R_A), so direct FWTW counterpart-sector cells for these economies do not exist at the publisher. Marginal stocks for these economies are obtainable via DF_T720R_A but were not pulled within the effort cap and are recorded as a marginal HOLE; the bilateral cells are UNVERIFIED-by-absence.

cell_basis_register.friction: EWN database is a manual Excel download (access-frictioned); not pulled within the effort cap. Would supply country-level row/column control totals (marginals), not bilateral cells.

block_summary_counts.note: Counts are of register blocks, not individual cells; per-cell counts are in dp2_residual.json (assembled-cell census).
